title: Riedlea mollis
taxonomy: Riedlea mollis is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is a part of the order Celastrales. Riedlea mollis is further classified under the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bittersweet. The family Celastraceae is divided into several genera, with Riedlea being one of them. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and phylogenetic relationships.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as potential antioxidant and antiviral activities.
